title: Midsommar
logline: A grieving young woman joins her boyfriend and his friends on a trip to a Swedish commune's midsummer festival, where pastoral beauty masks increasingly disturbing rituals that culminate in horrific sacrifice.
antagonistOrConflict: The Hårga commune and their ritualistic practices

actBreaks.description: The group arrives at the Hårga farmstead, transitioning from the outside world into the isolated commune.

validation.ruling: Scene #33 shows the group's arrival at the vast Hårga farmstead where a hundred fairy-tale dressed people form a welcoming committee, fundamentally shifting the story from urban grief drama to isolated commune horror and establishing the new world where the main conflicts will unfold.

actBreaks.description: Dani wins the May Queen competition, marking her full integration into the commune and setting up the final ritual.

validation.ruling: Scene #91 shows Christian emerging from the house in a daze after being told he can mate with Maja, wrestling with the moral quandary before a vague smile appears on his face as he walks toward the dance competition - this represents his final moral compromise and point of no return.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality:
This script follows a classic descent-into-hell structure, but inverts traditional horror expectations by bathing everything in bright daylight and pastoral beauty. The three-act structure moves from urban grief (Act 1) through escalating commune rituals (Act 2) to ritualistic climax (Act 3). What's particularly effective is how Aster uses the midsummer setting—where the sun never sets—to create a disorienting temporal flow that mirrors Dani's psychological state. The structure is deceptively simple but builds inexorably toward its horrific conclusion.

The pacing deliberately contrasts slow, meditative moments with sudden bursts of violence, creating a hypnotic rhythm that mirrors the commune's own ritualistic cadences. Each act escalates the stakes while simultaneously drawing Dani deeper into the Hårga's embrace, making her final choice feel both shocking and inevitable.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The script maintains a deliberately measured pace that accelerates in waves. Act 1 establishes grief and relationship tension through intimate scenes (scenes 3-17). Act 2 introduces increasingly disturbing rituals—the cliff jumping (scene 46), animal sacrifice (scene 67)—with breathing room between each escalation. The final act compresses time dramatically, with rapid cross-cutting between Christian's ritual sex (scenes 100-110) and Dani's discovery, leading to the climactic burning (scenes 113-121). The 125 scenes across 116 pages creates an average of just over one page per scene, contributing to the film's episodic, ritual-like rhythm.

incitingIncident.description: A firefighter opens car doors in a garage where engines hum and gardening hoses are taped to exhaust pipes leading into the house.

validation.ruling: Scene #4 shows Dani receiving a concerning email but doesn't shatter her ordinary world - it's setup. Scene #7 is the true inciting incident where a firefighter discovers the murder-suicide scene with car engines running and hoses piping exhaust into the house, confirming Dani's family is dead and irreversibly destroying her status quo.

midpoint.description: After the meal, elder Ylva stands and begins singing a wordless choral song that moves everyone to tears, with the community eventually joining in harmony.
midpoint.sceneHeading: EXT. FARMSTEAD - MID MEAL - MINUTES LATER

validation.ruling: Scene #46 is a quiet meal transition that doesn't create a point of no return. Scene #49 is the true midpoint where the two elders cut their palms and press bloody handprints onto rune stones at the clifftop, marking the ritual preparation before they jump to their deaths - this is the moment of no return that shifts the story into horror territory.

climax.description: Christian wakes paralyzed in a wheelchair facing a crowd while Dani sits on a flower throne in a massive floral dress and crown, surrounded by standing elders.

validation.ruling: Scene #115 shows Christian discovering evidence but is still setup/discovery. Scene #117 is the true climax where Christian wakes paralyzed in a wheelchair facing the crowd while Dani sits on a flower throne in her massive floral dress - this is the peak confrontation where both protagonists face their ultimate fates and the main story question is resolved.

scenes.heading: 1 EXT. WOODS - HALSINGLAND - DAY 1
scenes.summary: A montage of empty Swedish landscapes in Hälsingland plays with a Swedish lullaby.

scenes.heading: 2 EXT. HOUSE - MINNESOTA - NIGHT 2
scenes.summary: A suburban Minnesota house sits quietly in moonlight.

scenes.heading: 3 INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT 3
scenes.summary: A phone rings in a bedroom where a man and woman lie motionless, and an answering machine takes a call from a young woman.

scenes.heading: 4 INT. APARTMENT LIVING ROOM - BROOKLYN, NY - NIGHT 4
scenes.summary: Dani reads a disturbing email from her sister Terri about everything being black and calls Christian, who is casually hanging out with friends.
scenes.turningPointNote: Inciting incident - Dani receives the threatening email that sets the tragedy in motion

scenes.heading: 5 INT. KITCHEN - MINUTES LATER 5
scenes.summary: Dani paces anxiously in her kitchen, talking to a girlfriend about Christian seeming distant and her sister's scary emails while taking pills.

scenes.heading: 6 INT. PIZZA PARLOR - NEW YORK, NY - NIGHT 6
scenes.summary: Christian sits with his friends Mark, Josh, and Pelle at a pizza parlor while Mark lectures him about ending his relationship with Dani.

scenes.heading: 7 INT. GARAGE - MINNESOTA - NIGHT 7
scenes.summary: A firefighter opens car doors in a garage where engines hum and gardening hoses are taped to exhaust pipes leading into the house.

scenes.heading: 8 INT. HALLWAY - CONTINUOUS 8
scenes.summary: One gardening hose leads to a bedroom door that is now open with the hose taped to the bottom.

scenes.heading: 9 INT. BEDROOM - CONTINUOUS 9
scenes.summary: Police officers survey the bedroom where the man and woman are clearly dead, and the bodies are zipped into body bags.

scenes.heading: 10 INT. TERRI’S BEDROOM - SAME TIME 10
scenes.summary: Terri sits dead on her bedroom floor with a gardening hose duct-taped to her mouth and dried vomit around the tape, with her laptop showing three new messages from Dani.
scenes.turningPointNote: The murder-suicide is revealed - Dani's family is dead, fundamentally changing her circumstances

scenes.heading: 11 EXT. STREET - BROOKLYN, NY - NIGHT 11
scenes.summary: Christian runs through snowy Brooklyn streets toward Dani's building with ambivalent urgency.

scenes.heading: 12 INT. DANI’S APARTMENT - NIGHT 12
scenes.summary: Dani weeps violently against Christian's lap on the couch while he stares into space looking trapped, imagining a future he's being chained to.

scenes.heading: 13 INT. DANI’S BEDROOM - LATE AFTERNOON - 6 MONTHS LATER 13
scenes.summary: Six months later, Dani lies numbly on her bed until Christian arrives and hesitates when she offers to come to a party with him.

scenes.heading: 14 INT. APARTMENT - EVENING 14
scenes.summary: At a party, Dani learns about a trip to Sweden when Pelle mentions it to Mark, making Christian visibly nervous.

scenes.heading: 15 INT. LYFT CAR (MOVING) - NIGHT 15
scenes.summary: Dani sits in the back of a Lyft with busy, paranoid thoughts while Christian sits tensely in the front passenger seat.

scenes.heading: 16 INT. DANI’S APARTMENT - NIGHT 16
scenes.summary: Dani confronts Christian about the Sweden trip, discovering he already has a ticket and has been planning to go without telling her.

scenes.heading: 17 INT. MARK & JOSH’S APARTMENT - DAY 17
scenes.summary: Christian tells his friends that he invited Dani on the trip but expects she won't actually come, then she arrives at the apartment.
scenes.turningPointNote: Dani decides to join the Sweden trip, setting up the main story location

scenes.heading: 18 INT. AIRPLANE LAVATORY (IN FLIGHT) - DAY - 2 WEEKS LATER 18
scenes.summary: Dani enters an airplane lavatory and breaks down in violent sobs.

scenes.heading: 19 INT. AIRPLANE (IN FLIGHT) - MINUTES LATER 19
scenes.summary: Dani returns from the lavatory to sit beside Christian, who takes her hand and looks out the airplane window.

scenes.heading: 21 INT. RENTAL MINIVAN (MOVING) - DAY 21
scenes.summary: The group drives through Stockholm in a rental minivan while Mark comments on attractive Swedish women and they head toward the freeway.

scenes.heading: INT. FREEWAY RENTAL MINIVAN (MOVING) - LATER - DAY
scenes.summary: Dani wakes to a birthday message on her phone and asks Josh about his book on Nazi runic language while he explains his thesis research.

scenes.heading: 24 EXT. ROAD - TWO HOURS LATER 24
scenes.summary: Pelle drives under an anti-immigration banner and passes a sign announcing their arrival in Hälsingland.

scenes.heading: 25 EXT. MEADOW - CONTINUOUS 25
scenes.summary: The group arrives at a lush meadow where young people in traditional dress are camping, and Pelle reunites with friends from his village.
scenes.turningPointNote: Arrival at the commune - the main setting is established

scenes.heading: EXT. MEADOW - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: The group sits on grass feeling nauseous while Josh retches and Pelle explains they technically have food poisoning from what they consumed.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEADOW BUSH
scenes.summary: Dani vomits into a bush while Christian stands nearby and Pelle reassures her she'll still experience the drug effects.

scenes.heading: EXT. LARGE GRASSY MEADOW - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: The group lies on grass during their drug trip, with Mark panicking about the late hour still being bright daylight due to the midnight sun.

scenes.heading: 26 INT. OUTHOUSE - CONTINUOUS 26
scenes.summary: In a pitch-dark outhouse, Dani strikes a match and briefly sees a vision of her dead sister Terri before looking in a mirror and seeing extra eyes on her face.

scenes.heading: 27 EXT. OUTHOUSE - CONTINUOUS 27
scenes.summary: Dani runs frantically across the field, desperately wiping her face to remove the hallucinated extra eyes.

scenes.heading: 28 EXT. FIELD - SAME TIME 28
scenes.summary: Christian panics when he realizes Dani is missing while the others are too high to help, and Mark callously says she isn't all of their friend.

scenes.heading: 29 EXT. WOODS - SAME TIME 29
scenes.summary: Dani paces alone in the woods calling for help and her dead parents, realizing she's completely alone before discovering a dead rabbit with exposed innards.

scenes.heading: EXT. LARGE GRASSY MEADOW - WOODS - HOURS LATER
scenes.summary: Christian wakes Dani from sleep and she learns it's now her birthday as they prepare to follow a faint melody through the woods.

scenes.heading: 30 EXT. WOODS - DAY 30
scenes.summary: The group walks unsteadily through the woods following a hypnotic melody while Mark worries about ticks and Pelle confirms Sweden has a tick problem.

scenes.heading: 31 EXT. HÅRGA FARMSTEAD - CONTINUOUS 31
scenes.summary: The group arrives at the vast Hårga farmstead where a hundred people in traditional dress form a welcoming committee, and Pelle is embraced by the community.
scenes.turningPointNote: Arrival at the Hårga commune proper - the main location and community are fully revealed

scenes.heading: EXT. HÄRGA FARMSTEAD - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Teenagers serve food including a lamb's skull with exposed brain and heart surrounded by intestines, while some food is ceremonially thrown into a fire.

scenes.heading: 32 INT. BATHROOM - DAY 32
scenes.summary: A beautiful sixteen-year-old girl named Maja stands before a mirror, anxiously perfecting her hair.

scenes.heading: 33 EXT. HÅRGA FARMSTEAD - MINUTES LATER 33
scenes.summary: Maja emerges and watches the traditional long dance around a maypole, becoming instantly smitten when she spots Christian before being pulled into the dance.

scenes.heading: EXT. HÅRGA FARMSTEAD - MEANWHILE
scenes.summary: The group watches the dancers while Simon and Connie join them, and Dani notices Ingemar staring at her intensely.

scenes.heading: 34 EXT. HÅRGA FIELD - MINUTES LATER 34
scenes.summary: Pelle leads a tour of the commune, showing children carving runic symbols into bones and explaining various community practices and structures.

scenes.heading: 35 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - MINUTES LATER 35
scenes.summary: The group explores the main house interior with beds lining the walls and intricate murals covering every surface, while Mark points out sexual imagery in the paintings.

scenes.heading: 38 EXT. VILLAGE - “NIGHT” 38
scenes.summary: A high angle view shows the village at night with most people inside while the sun remains low on the horizon past midnight.

scenes.heading: INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: People prepare for sleep in the main house with boarded windows, and a woman places scissors under a crying baby's mattress to ward off invisibles.

scenes.heading: 39 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - “NIGHT” 39
scenes.summary: Dani lies awake while others sleep, noticing a mural of a happy man opening his wrist with a knife, then watches two teenagers sneak out together.

scenes.heading: 42 EXT. FIELD - MORNING 42
scenes.summary: Women collect morning dew in vials and sheets while men set up dining tables in a runic pattern and a group practices dance moves.

scenes.heading: 43 EXT. FARMSTEAD - ONE HOUR LATER 43
scenes.summary: The community gathers at tables arranged in a runic pattern for a meal, with Dani arriving with handpicked flowers while girls walk backwards through fields.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMSTEAD - MID-MEAL
scenes.summary: During the meal, Maja secretly carves a rune stone while Karin cradles a crying baby with rickets and explains the communal child-rearing philosophy to Dani.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMSTEAD - MID MEAL - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: After the meal, elder Ylva stands and begins singing a wordless choral song that moves everyone to tears, with the community eventually joining in harmony.
scenes.turningPointNote: First major ritual moment - the community's emotional unity is demonstrated through collective singing

scenes.heading: 44 EXT. HILL - MINUTES LATER 44
scenes.summary: The community follows the honored elders up a hill where the procession splits, with most people heading toward a valley while the elders continue upward.

scenes.heading: 45 EXT. VALLEY - MINUTES LATER 45
scenes.summary: The community gathers in a rocky valley below imposing cliffs while Dani wrestles with whether she can handle what's about to happen.

scenes.heading: 46 EXT. CLIFF - SAME TIME 46
scenes.summary: The two elders are carried to a clifftop where ceremonial blades cut their palms and they press bloody handprints onto freshly carved rune stones.

scenes.heading: EXT. BEACH - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Ylva appears at the cliff edge, assumes a ritualistic fetal pose reaching toward heaven, then leaps to her death on the jagged rocks below as Connie screams and the group watches in horror.
scenes.turningPointNote: The first major ritual death - the true nature of the commune's practices is violently revealed

scenes.heading: 48 EXT. FIELD - DAY 48
scenes.summary: Everyone walks back from the beach as Josh rushes toward the Main House, Dani tells Christian she needs to leave, and Christian accelerates to follow Josh.

scenes.heading: 49 EXT. FIELD - MOMENTS LATER 49
scenes.summary: Dani sprints away from the group, hides behind the triangular temple, hyperventilates, breaks down into violent sobs, and retches.

scenes.heading: EXT. STAGE - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Two Hårgan men remove stools from the stage while Mark watches, Josh enters the Main House, and Christian approaches in the distance.

scenes.heading: 50 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - SECONDS LATER 50
scenes.summary: Josh excitedly boots up his laptop while Christian nervously tells him he wants to do his thesis on Hårga, causing Josh to darken with concern.
scenes.turningPointNote: Christian's thesis decision creates direct competition with Josh, escalating their academic rivalry

scenes.heading: 51 EXT. FARMSTEAD - CONTINUOUS 51
scenes.summary: Christian emerges tense from the Main House, Simon and Connie express they can't stay four more days, and Christian approaches Maja who is decorating a tree.

scenes.heading: EXT. FIRE PIT - “EVENING”
scenes.summary: The corpses of Ylva and Dan are carried to the fire pit and lowered onto the flames while Hårgans stand respectfully around.

scenes.heading: 52 EXT. MEADOW - “EVENING” 52
scenes.summary: Dani sits by the lake trying to meditate with unstable breathing, tells Christian she can't stop shaking and feels like she's choking.

scenes.heading: 53 EXT. MEADOW - MOMENTS LATER 53
scenes.summary: Dani and Christian join Connie approaching a glowing lake while Mark whispers to Christian about a girl giving him sex eyes.

scenes.heading: 56 EXT. LAKE - SAME TIME 56
scenes.summary: Everyone arrives at a decorated lake where Siv explains they're giving Glädje's necklace to her mother Kärlek as praise for creating the sun.

scenes.heading: EXT. LAKE - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: A bell rings, Irma sings and announces to the lake, men hurl a decorated tree into the water, and Sven theatrically suggests the goddess might still be hungry.

scenes.heading: 59 EXT. FIELD - MINUTES LATER 59
scenes.summary: Dani pulls Christian aside and desperately pleads to leave, but Christian refuses because he's doing his thesis on the Hårga, leading to an escalating argument.

scenes.heading: 60 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - “NIGHT” 60
scenes.summary: Dani enters the darkened Main House, asks Josh for a sleeping pill, and swallows it whole despite his warning to cut it in half.

scenes.heading: 61 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - “NIGHT” 61
scenes.summary: Dani dreams that Christian, Mark, Josh and Pelle sneak out to the rental van while ignoring her, then wakes to find it was a nightmare.

scenes.heading: 62 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - “NIGHT” 62
scenes.summary: Maja sneaks over to Christian's bed and slides a rune stone under his mattress while Josh secretly watches her actions.

scenes.heading: 63 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - NEXT MORNING 63
scenes.summary: All beds are empty with morning activity heard outside, but Dani remains asleep.

scenes.heading: EXT. FIRE PIT - MORNING
scenes.summary: Two Hårgan men pull out an ash tray from beneath the fire pit containing the ashes of the burned elders.

scenes.heading: 64 EXT. BOOKBINDING HOUSE - MORNING 64
scenes.summary: Men scatter the elders' ashes across ashen ground while Pelle tends the garden, Mark and Josh approach, and ceremonially dressed men chop a straw goat into sections.

scenes.heading: 67 EXT. ANIMAL SACRIFICE HILL - DAY 67
scenes.summary: Nine animals' heads are secured in a pillory at the top of a hill while the entire community congregates at the bottom to watch.

scenes.heading: 69 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - MINUTES LATER 69
scenes.summary: Dani frantically packs to leave while Pelle enters and convinces her to stay by explaining this ceremony only happens every ninety years and giving her calming herbs.

scenes.heading: 70 EXT. ANIMAL SACRIFICE HILL - SAME TIME 70
scenes.summary: Simon becomes visibly distraught and aggressively confronts Ingemar about why the animals were killed, drawing attention from other community members.

scenes.heading: EXT. MAIN HOUSE
scenes.summary: Connie storms past with luggage while Odd tells her that Simon went to the train station and is sending a truck back for her.

scenes.heading: 73 EXT. FIELD - DAY 73
scenes.summary: Mark peers around a corner watching Ulf cry into Mats' shoulder about the desecrated Rotvälta while Christian interviews Valentin nearby.

scenes.heading: 76 EXT. FARMSTEAD - MINUTES LATER 76
scenes.summary: Dani walks around thinking and approaches a kitchen where Ulrika invites her to help prepare dinner, then asks about Simon's whereabouts.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMSTEAD - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Siv stands among laboring men and watches Dani through the kitchen window while the maypole is being transported.

scenes.heading: 77 INT. TEMPLE - SAME TIME 77
scenes.summary: Josh examines the Rubi Radr with Arne in the temple, learning it's emotional sheet music about grief with blank pages for future additions.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN - EVENING
scenes.summary: Dani halts while taking pies out of the oven upon hearing a distant scream.

scenes.heading: 81 EXT. FIRE TEMPLE - EVENING 81
scenes.summary: Mark freezes near the triangular temple upon hearing the same distant scream, then awkwardly waves at Inga who emerges from the house.

scenes.heading: 82 EXT. FIELD - EVENING 82
scenes.summary: At dinner, Christian receives a special meat pie with a basil leaf while Jarl explains that Connie ran away after learning Simon had already left.

scenes.heading: 83 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - “NIGHT” 83
scenes.summary: Dani asks Josh for half a sleeping pill while Josh climbs into bed still wearing his shoes, appearing tense and planning something.

scenes.heading: 84 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - LATER 84
scenes.summary: Josh sits up tensely, scans the room to ensure everyone is asleep, then quietly climbs out of bed and exits.

scenes.heading: 85 EXT. THE MAIN HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 85
scenes.summary: Josh rushes across the grass in darkest twilight and hustles nervously toward the temple.

scenes.heading: 86 INT. RUBEN’S TEMPLE - FOYER - CONTINUOUS 86
scenes.summary: Josh passes through the dark temple foyer to enter the main temple doors.

scenes.heading: 87 INT. RUBEN’S TEMPLE - CONTINUOUS 87
scenes.summary: Josh sneaks past sleeping Ruben and photographs pages of the holy Rubi Radr with his phone until he hears the front door creak and sees someone standing in the dark foyer.
scenes.turningPointNote: Josh's theft of sacred knowledge is discovered, putting him in immediate danger

scenes.heading: 88 INT. THE MAIN HOUSE - MORNING 88
scenes.summary: People wake to find both Josh's and Mark's beds empty.

scenes.heading: 89 EXT. FARMSTEAD - MORNING 89
scenes.summary: At breakfast, Dani and Christian wonder about Mark and Josh's whereabouts while Sten announces that the nineteenth book of Rubi Radr was found missing from the temple.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMSTEAD - LATER
scenes.summary: Arne and Sten confront Christian, Dani and Pelle about Josh's disappearance, with Christian insisting they know nothing while Dani mentions Mark went off with Inga.

scenes.heading: 90 EXT. FIELD - DAY 90
scenes.summary: Women queue to drink a bright yellow-green flower paste mixed in spring water while Dani joins the line and asks Karin what it is.

scenes.heading: 91 EXT. FIELD - MAYPOLE LATER 91
scenes.summary: Three circles of women form around the maypole for a dance competition while Dani, standing in the middle circle, hallucinates grass sprouting from her shoes.

scenes.heading: 92 INT. SMALL WHITE HOUSE - SMALL ROOM - SIV’S HOUSE - SAME TIME 92
scenes.summary: Christian sits in Siv's living room staring at a mural of a bear being burned alive before onlookers.

scenes.heading: 93 INT. SMALL WHITE HOUSE - LARGER ROOM - SIV’S HOUSE - 93
scenes.summary: Siv asks Christian how he feels about Maja and tells him he has been approved to mate with her, leaving him wrestling with the moral quandary.
scenes.turningPointNote: Christian is formally propositioned to participate in a ritual mating, crossing a major moral boundary

scenes.heading: 94 EXT. SMALL WHITE HOUSE - MINUTES LATER 94
scenes.summary: Christian emerges from the house in a daze, wrestling with the moral quandary, but a vague smile sneaks onto his face as he walks toward the dance competition.

scenes.heading: 95 EXT. FIELD - MAYPOLE - SAME TIME 95
scenes.summary: Dani continues the tree-penis dance as hallucinations take their toll, the music stops abruptly, everyone freezes, then resumes with a new weaving dance as women get disqualified.

scenes.heading: EXT. FIELD - MAYPOLE - LATER
scenes.summary: Many women have been disqualified leaving ten remaining, two collide and fall when the music stops, and Karin hugs and kisses Dani on the lips.

scenes.heading: EXT. FIELD - MAYPOLE - MEANWHILE
scenes.summary: Christian sits among onlookers when Ulla offers him the flower-spiked water, explaining it breaks down defenses and opens him for influence.

scenes.heading: EXT. FIELD - MAYPOLE - IN THE DANCING CIRCLE
scenes.summary: Dani's eyes show rising panic as two women hallucinate centipedes covering the ground, scream in horror, and flee the circle, leaving only three dancers.

scenes.heading: EXT. FIELD - MAYPOLE
scenes.summary: Only Dani and two other women remain dancing, with Dani growing competitive and determined to win as she tastes victory.

scenes.heading: EXT. FIELD - MAYPOLE - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Women rush to congratulate Dani but she keeps dancing afraid it's a trick, until they embrace her and Irma places a garland crown on her head, declaring her May Queen.
scenes.turningPointNote: Dani wins the May Queen competition, fundamentally changing her status and role within the community

scenes.heading: EXT. FIELD - DINING AREA - LATER
scenes.summary: Dani is carried on a pedestal to a throne at mirror-topped tables, then walks forward with growing confidence as flowers magically sprout from the ground with each step.

scenes.heading: EXT. FIELD - DINING AREA - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: After dinner, Siv tells May Queen Dani it's traditional to bless the crops and livestock, gesturing toward a carriage with unlit torches surrounded by girls.

scenes.heading: 96 INT. CARRIAGE - CONTINUOUS 96
scenes.summary: Dani takes a seat in the carriage while young women gather with rods to pull it and others hold juniper boughs and light their torches.

scenes.heading: 97 EXT. DINING AREA - SAME TIME 97
scenes.summary: The community watches as women pull a carriage away while Christian observes guilt-ridden, and a girl scatters flowers to create a new path between Christian and the temple.

scenes.heading: 98 INT. CARRIAGE (MOVING) - MOMENTS LATER 98
scenes.summary: Dani looks out the carriage window as it moves through wheat fields while accompanying women wave torches and cast away dark spirits.

scenes.heading: 99 EXT. FIELD - SAME TIME 99
scenes.summary: The girl finishes the flower path at Christian's feet, and Christian rises and walks warily toward the temple as all eyes watch him.

scenes.heading: 100 INT. TEMPLE - CONTINUOUS 100
scenes.summary: Christian enters the temple foyer where Mats hands him a white gown and directs him to change behind a modesty panel.

scenes.heading: 101 EXT. WHEAT FIELD - SAME TIME 101
scenes.summary: Dani steps out of the stopped carriage and holds a torch with Hanna while three women pour grain, drop a steak, and crack an egg into a hole in the ground.

scenes.heading: 102 INT. TEMPLE - FOYER - SAME TIME 102
scenes.summary: Christian changes into the white gown and reluctantly breathes in steam from a stone pot held by Mats for his vitality.

scenes.heading: 103 INT. TEMPLE - CONTINUOUS 103
scenes.summary: Christian enters the dark temple where nude Maja lies on a bed of birch twigs and flowers surrounded by humming nude older women, and Maja tilts her head toward him.

scenes.heading: 104 EXT. CATTLE HOUSE - SAME TIME 104
scenes.summary: Dani holds a torch and blesses livestock near the cattle house while Hanna sings as the sun nears twilight.

scenes.heading: 105 INT. TEMPLE - SAME TIME 105
scenes.summary: Christian kneels between Maja's legs, kisses her, and enters her while she digs her nails into his back as the women's singing rises and falls.

scenes.heading: 106 EXT. FARMSTEAD - MOMENTS LATER 106
scenes.summary: Dani returns to the farmstead and hears distant singing from the temple, asking Hanna about it but being told it's not for them as she feels drawn toward the temple.

scenes.heading: 107 INT. TEMPLE - FOYER - CONTINUOUS 107
scenes.summary: Dani enters the temple foyer and peers through the keyhole to see Christian having sex with Maja while surrounding women hold their breasts and moan in tandem.
scenes.turningPointNote: Dani discovers Christian's betrayal in the ritual, shattering their relationship and her last connection to her old life

scenes.heading: 108 EXT. TEMPLE - CONTINUOUS 108
scenes.summary: Dani runs outside and vomits in shock, struggling to breathe as the young women surround her and guide her toward the main house.

scenes.heading: 109 INT. MAIN HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 109
scenes.summary: The women usher Dani to her bed where Hanna holds her face and guides her breathing until Dani breaks down crying and releases all her bottled emotions.

scenes.heading: 110 INT. TEMPLE - SAME TIME 110
scenes.summary: The temple ceremony reaches its peak with Christian thrusting faster as an old woman pushes his buttocks to urge him on while Maja moans in euphoria.

scenes.heading: 111 EXT. TEMPLE - BOOK BINDING - CHICKEN COOP - CONTINUOUS 111
scenes.summary: Christian exits the temple disoriented, sees Dani's vomit puddle and retches, then walks toward the book binding house while avoiding the main house where he hears crying.

scenes.heading: 112 INT. CHICKEN COOP - CONTINUOUS 112
scenes.summary: Christian enters the chicken coop and discovers Simon's naked body suspended midair with his back opened, ribs separated, and lungs pulled out to look like bloody wings.

scenes.heading: 113 EXT. STAGE - NEXT DAY 113
scenes.summary: Christian wakes paralyzed in a wheelchair facing a crowd while Dani sits on a flower throne in a massive floral dress and crown, surrounded by standing elders.
scenes.turningPointNote: The final ritual begins with Dani transformed into the May Queen and Christian as her helpless sacrifice

scenes.heading: 114 EXT. FIELD - EVENING 114
scenes.summary: Connie's waterlogged corpse, dressed in greenery and jewels, is wheeled in a wheelbarrow toward the yellow-painted sacred house.

scenes.heading: 115 INT. SACRED HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 115
scenes.summary: The sacred house interior reveals corpses arranged against the walls including Connie, Mark, the two elders, and Josh's dirt-covered body with eyes and nostrils stuffed with petals.

scenes.heading: 116 EXT. BOOKBINDING HOUSE - SAME TIME 116
scenes.summary: Ulf and Ingemar are embraced passionately by community members outside the open doors of the bookbinding house.

scenes.heading: 117 INT. BOOK-BINDING ROOM - SAME TIME 117
scenes.summary: Hårgan laborers gut a dead bear and fit Christian's paralyzed body inside the hollowed carcass, inserting his legs first.

scenes.heading: 118 INT. SACRED HOUSE - MINUTES LATER 118
scenes.summary: Christian is sewn inside the bear carcass with only his face visible through the removed jaw opening as a man dressed as Vídorr stands before him holding the Rubi Radr.

scenes.heading: 119 EXT. FIELD - SAME TIME 119
scenes.summary: Torch-men exit the house as fire spreads inside while Dani watches with dissociated eyes and the community sings in trembling anticipation behind her.

scenes.heading: 120 INT. SACRED HOUSE - SAME TIME 120
scenes.summary: The fire grows as Christian is steam-boiled inside the burning bear until Ulf is consumed by flames and screams while Ingemar watches with detached fascination.

scenes.heading: 121 EXT. FIELD - SAME TIME 121
scenes.summary: The entire Hårgan community screams in sympathy with Ulf's pain while Dani watches the burning house, her expression shifting from horror to sorrow before she buries her face and walks away sobbing.
scenes.turningPointNote: Dani's final emotional transformation as she witnesses Christian's death and fully accepts her place in the Hårga community

structuralWarnings.text: All 3 key moments were auto-corrected by Phase 1C
